name: Onslaught

draft.notes: Foil appears at end of pack, displacing a card of the same rarity. Foil basic lands displace a common (basic lands otherwise do not appear in booster packs).

sourceNotes: Large set. Printed in USA (sequential) and Belgium. 36 packs per box. No basic land or ad card in booster. Tournament packs (30 lands, 3 rares, 10 uncommons, 32 commons) described but not modelled.
